title: Add max-length warning for JWT payload textarea (very long input causes visual overflow)
description: QA gap: JWT payload textarea (SecurityModule.tsx:3153) has no max-length. User can paste 10KB+ of JSON, creating an unusably long encoded token in the display. Add: (1) character count indicator below textarea, (2) warning when payload exceeds 1KB ('JWT payloads should be small — this is 10KB'), (3) encoded token display wraps gracefully with horizontal scroll.
acceptanceCriteria: Character count shown below JWT payload textarea
Encoded token display doesn't break layout with large payloads

title: Add empty password validation in Password Hashing demo
description: QA gap: demonstrateBcrypt('') runs without error but shows empty string in 'Plaintext Input' step, which is misleading — it suggests bcrypt can hash nothing. Add: show a note 'Empty passwords are technically valid but should never be allowed in production — always enforce minimum length.' Or auto-fill with 'password123' as default (already the case in useState default, but input can be cleared).
acceptanceCriteria: Clearing the password input shows a helpful note about empty passwords
Note is educational: 'In production, enforce minimum password length'
Demo still runs on empty input (not blocked) but with the warning

title: Make AES matrix responsive at high zoom levels (150%+)
description: QA gap: AES matrix cells are fixed h-12 w-12 (48px). Two 4×4 grids side-by-side = 384px minimum. At 150% zoom on a 1280px viewport, effective width is 853px. With sidebar (18%) and properties (20%), canvas is ~530px. Two grids + padding may overflow. Make grids stack vertically when viewport is narrow or use relative sizing (w-[clamp(2rem,3vw,3rem)]).
acceptanceCriteria: AES grids don't overflow at 150% zoom on 1280px viewport
At narrow widths, grids stack vertically instead of side-by-side
Cell text (hex values) remains readable at all zoom levels
